Meta.title: Drwintech — Innovative Digital Solutions
Meta.description: Drwintech designs, develops and advises on technology solutions for individuals, businesses and institutions. Web, mobile, AI, cybersecurity, digital transformation.

Hero.title: Let's engineer your <gradient>innovative digital solutions</gradient>
Hero.subtitle: Drwintech is a company specialized in design, development and technology consulting. We help individuals, businesses and institutions with their digital transformation and security.

Services.title: Five disciplines, <gradient>one promise</gradient>
Services.subtitle: From consulting to deployment, we cover the entire digital value chain so you can scale with confidence.

web-mobile.title: Web & Mobile Development
web-mobile.description: Design and development of modern, high-performance and secure websites, platforms and mobile applications.

custom.title: Custom digital solutions
custom.description: Development of digital solutions tailored to the specific needs of each organization.

transformation.title: Digital transformation & automation
transformation.description: Digitization and automation of business processes to optimize operational performance.

ai-data.title: Artificial intelligence & data
ai-data.description: Leveraging data and AI to improve decision-making and performance.

security.title: Cybersecurity & IT infrastructure
security.description: Securing, managing and optimizing IT infrastructures and information systems.

About.title: A technology company <gradient>serving your transformation</gradient>
About.paragraph1: Drwintech specializes in design, development and technology consulting. We offer a broad range of services to support individuals, businesses and institutions through their digital transformation and security.
About.paragraph2: Our mission: design innovative technology solutions that meaningfully address the challenges faced by businesses and organizations. Driven by a diverse, passionate and committed team, we operate in a collaborative environment that fosters creativity, continuous learning and positive impact.

excellence.title: Operational excellence
excellence.description: Reliable delivery, maintainable code, audited processes.

innovation.title: Useful innovation
innovation.description: Tech serves your goals, not the other way around.

impact.title: Local impact
impact.description: Local talent grown on the job, regional economic spillover.

Portfolio.title: Projects that <gradient>ship results</gradient>
Portfolio.subtitle: A few of our recent collaborations, from concept to launch.

detail.methodIntro: Every project is run with the double diamond, the Design Council standard: two divergent phases (broad exploration) alternated with two convergent phases (structural choices). It ensures we design the right thing before designing it right.

define.label: Define
define.hint: Frame the real problem to solve.

Team.title: Complementary <gradient>profiles</gradient>
Team.subtitle: Strategists, engineers, designers and creatives under one roof.

Process.title: From idea to launch, in <gradient>four stages</gradient>
Process.intro: Our methodology follows the agile SCRUM approach. It guarantees co-construction with the client and successive validations throughout the project.

discover.title: Discovery
discover.description: Framing, workshops, audit of existing systems, KPI definition.

design.title: Design
design.description: Architecture, interactive prototypes, design system, user validation.

build.title: Development
build.description: Agile SCRUM sprints, weekly reviews, continuous integration.

scale.title: Delivery
scale.description: Production rollout, training, support, ongoing optimization.

Blog.title: The <gradient>Drwintech</gradient> blog
Blog.subtitle: Through our blog, we share our expertise, our experience and our vision of digital technologies to help businesses and organizations better understand the digital landscape.

CTA.title: Ready to scale?
CTA.subtitle: Let's talk about your project. First chat free, no commitment, within 24 hours.

Footer.tagline: Innovative Digital Solutions — we turn your ideas into custom web, mobile and software applications.
Footer.newsletterDesc: Our tech insights, once a month. No spam.

Contact.title: Tell us about your <gradient>project</gradient>
Contact.subtitle: Describe what you need, we'll get back within one business day.

form.name: Full name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Message received, thank you. We'll get back to you shortly.
form.error: Something went wrong. Try again or message us on WhatsApp.

Careers.title: Build the future <gradient>with us</gradient>
Careers.subtitle: Join an ambitious, kind team shipping high-impact projects.
Careers.noOpenings: No open roles right now. Send us a spontaneous application.

impact.title: Impact
impact.description: Diverse, innovative projects that transform the region.

balance.title: Work/life balance
balance.description: A culture that respects your personal life.

diversity.title: Diversity & inclusion
diversity.description: An open, plural and caring team.

1.title: Apply
1.description: Candidates submit their application via our platform. Each application is carefully reviewed to highlight skills.

2.title: Profile review
2.description: Our team studies applications to evaluate the fit with the role requirements, the skills sought and the company's values.

3.title: Interview
3.description: Shortlisted candidates are invited to an interview to assess their technical skills and their fit with our culture.

4.title: Decision
4.description: A decision is made at the end of the process. Selected profiles receive structured support during their onboarding.

ClientArea.title: Client area
ClientArea.subtitle: Track your projects, invoices and support tickets at a glance.
